title: Norysca kalmiana
intro: Norysca kalmiana, also known as Kalmia latifolia's variant, is a plant species within the heath family (Ericaceae). It is primarily valued for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may aid in reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Bioactive constituents of Norysca kalmiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support mental well-being and cardiovascular health.
